title: Humble Beginnings
text: Your garden is quiet, the tomatoes are ripe, and your first customer is approaching. It's time to build a legacy... one slice of bread at a time.

title: Business Strategy
text: Your profits are growing. A local food blogger wants to feature you. Do you give them a free lunch for a massive hype boost, or charge them triple for the 'exclusive experience'?

title: Red Planet Heat
text: Mars is hotter than expected. The Martian Peppers are practically self-cooking. Be careful—if they get too hot, your ingredients might burn!
